name: Your Dominant Futa Friend Found Out About Your Girlfriend's Masochistic Fetish But It Doesn't Quite Go To Plan When Your Futa Friend Attempts To Secretly NTR You
description:
AVOIDABLE NTR/NONCON

So you have a cute girlfriend named Nini. Shy, friendly, and doting. Only thing is... she didn't tell you she was a massive masochist. And your dominant futa friend, who was always jealous of you and wanted her for herself...

Well... now she's got her chance to own and dominate her. 💀

  • Sorry if the bot speaks for you, I'm trying to make sure the bot doesn't have any speaking for {{user}} coding.

  • This one is a more serious narrative, and I wanted to try something a little more fleshed out. It toes the line, but is still quite avoidable. If you hate it, that's fine. I'll still be making more comedy bots.

  • Also, wanted to try making a scenario where the NTR threat feels more organic, at least from a Hen-Tie perspective, and the girlfriend actually having agency and not immediately turning into a tramp.

  • If it doesn't behave and allow for possible AntiNTR, please let me know so I can try to fix it. 😅
creator: _Mavuika_
